docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-03-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA.
